summary: All tests PASSED for Edit Product with Variations support, Wisher UI Guide creation, and old product-add.tsx removal

verified_features.add_new_product_button: WORKING - Navigates to enhanced add.tsx with 16 categories

add_product_screen.CATEGORY_horizontal_scroll: ✓ (Groceries, Beverages, Dairy & Eggs, Fruits, Vegetables, etc.)

verified_features.edit_product_navigation: WORKING - Clicking product card navigates to /(main)/product-edit/{id}

edit_product_screen.header_with_save: ✓ Edit Product header with Save button
edit_product_screen.unit_selector: ✓ (kg, g for Weight; L, ml for Volume)
edit_product_screen.VARIATIONS_list: ✓ (Label, Price, Discounted, Stock, In Stock toggle)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 4 products (Basmati Rice, Milk 1 liter, Wheat 1Kg, White Rice 1kg)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Product screen with variations support fully verified. The product 'Basmati Rice' was tested with variations (1kg variation shown). Navigation flow: Login -> My Shop -> My Warehouse -> Click product card -> Edit Product screen. Add Product also verified with same features. Note: .expo/types/router.d.ts cache may need clearing after file deletions (required restart to fix 'ENOENT: product-add.tsx' error after deletion).

testing_notes.expo_cache_issue_resolved: Cleared .expo/types/router.d.ts and .metro-cache after product-add.tsx deletion to fix Metro bundler error
